title: Kadavul Serthuvacha Lyrics Oru Kanavu Pola
stanzas:
<div>
Kadavul Serthuvacha Lyrics Oru Kanavu Pola

kadavul serthuvachcha
jodi thaanunga
kadal alai oayum varai
vazha vaazhthunga (2)

ini kaalamellaam
rendu perum
kai korthu nadakkanum
ada paththaam maasam
pakkathula pudhu
varavu kedakkanum.

nenjula nenappathellaam
nerula nadanthaale
soththu sogam thevaiyilla
sorgamum thavaiyilla

edhu ingae nerantharamo
evarukkum purivathilla
alli koduthaalum
anbu kuraivathilla

indha vazhkai oru kanavu
adhu kalanji pogalaam
ada anbu natpu kadhal
adhil kadavul paarkalaam

namakkunu vaazhugira
idhayam kedachuputta
vazhve yogamadaa
vaanam kooda valaiyumadaa

kadavul serthuvachcha
jodi thaanunga
kadal alai oayum varai
vazha vaazhthunga

ini kaalamellaam
rendu perum
kai korthu nadakkanum
ada paththaam maasam
pakkathula pudhu
varavu kedakkanum.

vazhkai oru muraithaan
vazhnthu paarthidanum
anbu uravugalaal
adha nee nerappidadum

edhaiyum thaangidathaan
manasa pazhakkikanum
tholil saanjikitte
thunbam vilakkikanum

manaivi endra peyaril
oru thaayum keedaikkuraa
ingu kanavan endra uravil
oru thandhai irukkiraan,.

kaalathin nadhi vazhiye
pogum payanamidhu
kalyaana thuduppeduthu
neendhi sellum oadam idhu

oorey kannu padum
nooru poruthamthaan
sanga Tamizh kodutha
kamban ...

ada uchchi mudhal padham
varai alandhu vachchathu
yaarunga.

indha ulagaththukke
kanakezhudhum
osaram ulla saaminga.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kadavul Serthuvacha?

The song celebrates love and togetherness, capturing the essence of a romantic journey.

Who is the singer of Kadavul Serthuvacha?

The song is sung by Haricharan, known for his soulful voice.

When was the movie Oru Kanavu Pola released?

The movie was released in 2017.

What emotions does the song evoke?

The song evokes feelings of happiness, love, and serenity.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Kadavul Serthuvacha from Oru Kanavu Pola is a romantic melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and companionship. Sung by Haricharan, the song's soothing tunes and heartfelt lyrics create a serene atmosphere, perfect for weddings and anniversaries. It conveys the joy of togetherness and the promise of a shared future. The melody evokes emotions of happiness and contentment, making it a cherished addition to any romantic playlist.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the enchanting melody of Kadavul Serthuvacha from the movie Oru Kanavu Pola, beautifully rendered by Haricharan. This romantic tune captures the essence of love and togetherness, making it a perfect choice for special occasions. Dive into a world of soothing rhythms and heartfelt lyrics that promise to leave a lasting impression.
stanzaMeanings: The pair brought together by God, may they live until the waves of the sea stop.
From now on, the two should walk hand in hand, and in the tenth month, a new arrival should be near.
When all the dreams in the heart come true, there's no need for sorrow or even heaven.
What is permanent here, no one understands, but even if you give away, love doesn't decrease.
This life is like a dream, it can disappear, but love, friendship, and affection are where God can be seen.
If we have a heart to live for us, life is bliss, and even the sky will bend for us.
The pair brought together by God, may they live until the waves of the sea stop.
From now on, the two should walk hand in hand, and in the tenth month, a new arrival should be near.
Life is a one-time experience, live it and fill it with love and relationships.
The heart should get used to enduring anything and push away sadness by leaning on shoulders.
In the name of a wife, you get a mother here, and in the bond of a husband, there's a father.
This journey goes along the river of time, it's a boat that swims with the wedding veil.
Who measured from the top to the feet?
There are gods who write the fate of this world.
